name: Scientific Paper
description: A peer-reviewable, signable, reproducible scientific paper. Requires IMRaD structure, CSL-JSON bibliography, SPDX license, at least one ORCID-resolvable author DID, and declared accessibility baseline. Tightened per the scientific-paper positioning (docs/POSITIONING.md).

required_files.description: CSL-JSON bibliography. Every ::cite[key] reference must resolve against an entry here.

validation_rules.description: At least one author required for attribution.
Every author entry must have either a did:web resolving to an ORCID record, or an explicit orcid field. Unattributed papers are not valid scientific contributions.
At least 3 keywords required for discoverability and indexing.
Cap at 10 keywords to avoid keyword stuffing.
Every figure asset must have non-empty alt_text. Required for WCAG 2.1 AA.
Every figure must have either inline long_description or long_description_path.
Math directives must include MathML accessibility alternative for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
document.license must use an SPDX identifier. Unlabeled or custom licenses are not valid for scientific publication.
For scientific-paper profile, license must be on the OA-compatible allow-list. Journals may further restrict via their own derived profile.
document.accessibility.api_compliance must contain at least WCAG-2.1-AA. Upgrade to 2.2-AA optional.
Every ::cell block must reference a kernel declared in interactivity.kernels[]. Reviewers need to know what to re-execute with.
Every ::cell block must have at least one ::output (cached execution result). Authors must ship proof of execution; reviewers re-execute for verification.
Every external ::include (non-local target) must have content_hash pinning. Transclusion without pinning is a supply-chain risk.
Every ::cite[key] must resolve to an entry in references.json. Unresolved citations block submission.
Every ::ref[id] must resolve to a ::fig / ::eq / ::tab / heading-id in the document or an included file.
A Data Availability Statement section is required by most modern OA journals; profile enforces it.
External images and scripts must be explicitly permitted via security.permissions.allow_external_images / allow_scripts. Default is deny.

author.description: At least one author signature required for submission.

notes: Use ::fig{id=X} / ::eq{id=X} / ::tab{id=X} for labelable figures, equations, and tables; reference via ::ref[X].
Cite sources via ::cite[key] resolving against references.json (CSL-JSON).
Include a DOI in document.custom.doi once minted via Crossref or DataCite.
Re-signing is required after every content change; stale signatures block submission.
